mapper.insert: INSERT INTO document (doc_id, base_id, file_name, file_type, status, chunk_count, created_at) VALUES (#{docId}, #{baseId}, #{fileName}, #{fileType}, #{status}, #{chunkCount}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT doc_id, base_id, file_name, file_type, status, chunk_count, created_at FROM document WHERE doc_id = #{docId}
SELECT doc_id, base_id, file_name, file_type, status, chunk_count, created_at FROM document WHERE base_id = #{baseId}
mapper.update: UPDATE document SET status = #{status} WHERE doc_id = #{docId}
